import hashlib
import hmac

from relay.canonical import canonical_target
from relay.keys import KeyRing, SigningKey
from relay.verifier import verify_delivery


def wire_signature(secret, timestamp, method, target, payload):
    material = f"{timestamp}\n{method}\n{target}\n".encode() + payload
    return hmac.new(secret, material, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()


def test_canonical_target_retains_repeated_parameters():
    rendered = canonical_target("/hook?scope=write&blank=&scope=read")
    assert rendered == "/hook?blank=&scope=read&scope=write"


def test_recently_retired_key_remains_a_candidate_during_grace():
    old = SigningKey("rotating", b"old", 20, 100)
    ring = KeyRing([old], grace_seconds=10)
    assert ring.candidates("rotating", 109) == [old]


def test_v2_millisecond_timestamp_uses_seconds_for_freshness():
    secret = b"v2-secret"
    raw = "1700000000000"
    payload = b"v2"
    target = "/v2/receive?mode=full"
    headers = {
        "X-Relay-Timestamp": raw,
        "X-Relay-Key": "v2",
        "X-Relay-Signature": wire_signature(
            secret, raw, "PUT", target, payload
        ),
    }
    ring = KeyRing([SigningKey("v2", secret, 1699999900, 1700000100)])
    assert verify_delivery(
        "put", target, payload, headers, ring, now=1700000001
    ) is True
